virginia-beach-va.maintenancePara: Virginia Beach fence maintenance: annual sealing or staining is mandatory for wood fences; mildewcide treatment every 2-3 years prevents rot and black staining. Gate hardware (hinges, latches, closers) is the most common failure point regardless of fence material.
